name: Osteoporosis - Low DEXA T-score Query (≤ -2.5)
description: Tests ability to find osteoporosis patients via DEXA bone density scan T-score ≤ -2.5 (the WHO criterion for osteoporosis). First DEXA T-score lab phenotype. Includes Path D patients (low T-score without formal osteoporosis diagnosis — undiagnosed disease).
prompt: Find patients with DEXA bone density T-scores at or below -2.5.

prompts.naive: Find patients with low bone density.
prompts.broad: Find patients with bone density T-score at or below -2.5 — the WHO diagnostic criterion for osteoporosis on DEXA bone density scan.
prompts.expert: Search Observation resources with LOINC 38265-5 (DXA T-score) where value-quantity ≤ -2.5. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|38265-5&value-quantity=le-2.5

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with low DEXA T-score Observations (osteoporotic range). Includes Path D (no formal dx).

required_codes.display: DXA Radius and Ulna [T-score] Bone density
